title: Calculate Data Center PUE
description: Algorithm to calculate Power Usage Effectiveness for a data center
code:
ALGORITHM Calculate_PUE
INPUT: TotalFacilityEnergy, ITEquipmentEnergy
OUTPUT: PUE_Value

BEGIN
 IF ITEquipmentEnergy <= 0 THEN
 DISPLAY "Error: IT energy must be positive"
 RETURN -1
 END IF
 
 PUE_Value = TotalFacilityEnergy / ITEquipmentEnergy
 
 DISPLAY "Total Facility Energy: " + TotalFacilityEnergy + " kWh"
 DISPLAY "IT Equipment Energy: " + ITEquipmentEnergy + " kWh"
 DISPLAY "PUE: " + PUE_Value
 
 IF PUE_Value <= 1.2 THEN
 DISPLAY "Rating: Excellent - Very Efficient"
 ELSE IF PUE_Value <= 1.5 THEN
 DISPLAY "Rating: Good - Efficient"
 ELSE IF PUE_Value <= 2.0 THEN
 DISPLAY "Rating: Average - Needs Improvement"
 ELSE
 DISPLAY "Rating: Poor - Highly Inefficient"
 END IF
 
 RETURN PUE_Value
END
explanation: This algorithm calculates PUE by dividing total facility energy by IT equipment energy. A PUE closer to 1.0 indicates higher efficiency. The algorithm also provides rating based on the calculated PUE value.

title: Server Consolidation Decision
description: Algorithm to determine if server consolidation is beneficial for energy savings
code:
ALGORITHM Server_Consolidation
INPUT: NumberOfServers, AverageUtilization, PowerPerServer, CoolingFactor
OUTPUT: EnergySavings, RecommendedServers

BEGIN
 CurrentEnergy = NumberOfServers * PowerPerServer * 24 * 365
 CurrentCooling = CurrentEnergy * CoolingFactor
 TotalCurrentEnergy = CurrentEnergy + CurrentCooling
 
 // Calculate target servers after consolidation
 TargetUtilization = 0.75 // Target 75% utilization
 RecommendedServers = CEIL(NumberOfServers * AverageUtilization / TargetUtilization)
 
 NewEnergy = RecommendedServers * PowerPerServer * 24 * 365
 NewCooling = NewEnergy * (CoolingFactor * 0.6) // Cooling improves by 40%
 TotalNewEnergy = NewEnergy + NewCooling
 
 EnergySavings = TotalCurrentEnergy - TotalNewEnergy
 SavingsPercentage = (EnergySavings / TotalCurrentEnergy) * 100
 
 DISPLAY "Current Servers: " + NumberOfServers
 DISPLAY "Recommended Servers: " + RecommendedServers
 DISPLAY "Annual Energy Savings: " + EnergySavings + " kWh"
 DISPLAY "Savings Percentage: " + SavingsPercentage + "%"
 
 RETURN EnergySavings
END
explanation: This algorithm helps decide whether server consolidation would be beneficial by calculating energy savings. It considers both direct power consumption and cooling requirements, showing potential reduction in energy usage.
